stack.llmRouting: Groq (T-A: Llama 3.1 8B / T-B: Llama 3.3 70B) — single provider, no fallback
stack.cache: Upstash Redis (rate-limit counters, hot-path caching only)
stack.auth: Supabase Auth (login/signup/logout/session/refresh) with JWKS tenancy verification

openDecisions.title: Paddle Pakistan-entity onboarding
openDecisions.mitigation: BillingProvider interface built provider-agnostic; fallback = second adapter, not a rewrite

openDecisions.title: Credit reservation ↔ subscription-state interaction
openDecisions.recommendation: No force-release on cancellation; TTL sweeper handles both cases

openDecisions.title: Stack pivot
openDecisions.resolution: Meilisearch + pgvector alongside; LLM ladder kept; Upstash Redis for caching

M1-workspace.notes: 4 endpoints, full CRUD, RBAC, 16 contract tests, wired into app composition

M2-creator.notes: 6 endpoints (CRUD, detail, reveal, history, refresh), Meilisearch projection, identity resolution (ADR-029), minor_signal enforcement, credit-gated reveal (TD-01 fixed: db.transaction wraps reserve→insert→commit), reveal rate limiting (10/min/workspace), wired into app composition

M3-search.notes: Brain 1 filtered + Brain 2 NL search + ranking (8 factors: relevance, criteria, authenticity, quality, freshness, fairness, rising_score, pakistan_boost) + quote + trending endpoint + demographic filters, wired into app composition

M4-billing.notes: Paddle adapter, webhook handler, entitlement resolver, reservation lifecycle (ADR-030), wired into app composition

M5-discovery.notes: Serper → Apify → LLM orchestrator, timeline writer consumer

M7-ai-enrichment.notes: Authenticity, quality, audience scoring with provenance triple

M8-crm.notes: Lists CRUD, tags, members, workspaceId bug fixed, wired into app composition via list.routes.ts

M9-outreach.notes: Resend email adapter wired, minor_signal enforcement, event emission now transactional (ADR-020), 8 real behavioral tests

M10-feedback.notes: DOC-030: reports, tickets, priority scoring, admin queue

M12-analytics.notes: Workspace/creator analytics, benchmarking, outreach metrics, wired into app composition via analytics.routes.ts

M13-launch-hardening.notes: App composition created, middleware chain verified, health/auth/admin routes added, launch-hardening tests rewritten with behavioral assertions

infrastructure.ci: GitHub Actions (build, lint, format, typecheck, test, test:integration, gitleaks, validate-credentials, deploy, deploy-staging)
infrastructure.typecheck: all 9 packages pass typecheck (test file type issues are pre-existing and excluded from build)
infrastructure.rlsPolicies: DEFINED in V005 — workspace-scoped policies for all 11 WP tables + staff_user + reveal
infrastructure.workers: 3 event consumers (timeline, feedback, billing) + 2 scheduled jobs (credit grant, reservation sweeper) + bootstrap entry point
infrastructure.auth: Supabase Auth (5 endpoints: login, signup, logout, session, refresh) + Staff identity management (create, promote, demote, revoke)
infrastructure.frontend: Next.js app with auth flow, dashboard, search, lists, analytics, admin panel, staff portal, creator detail page — all pages wired to real API responses
infrastructure.security: Rate limiting, Staff RBAC, Audit logging, MFA enforcement, RLS enforcement, Impersonation system
infrastructure.observability: Metrics collection, SLO tracking, Health checks (liveness + full), Alerting rules
infrastructure.vault: 21 ADRs, 15 risks tracked, 10 assumptions tracked, 7 research insight files

assembly.serverEntry: packages/api/src/server.ts — standalone Hono server with graceful shutdown
assembly.workerBootstrap: apps/workers/src/bootstrap.ts — self-starting worker with graceful shutdown
routesRegistered: GET /api/v1/admin/stats, POST /api/v1/admin/staff, GET /api/v1/admin/staff, GET /api/v1/admin/staff/:id, PATCH /api/v1/admin/staff/:id/promote, PATCH /api/v1/admin/staff/:id/demote, POST /api/v1/admin/staff/:id/revoke

GET /api/v1/staff/workspaces, GET /api/v1/staff/workspaces/:id, GET /api/v1/staff/customers, GET /api/v1/staff/creators/:id, GET /api/v1/staff/audit/:workspaceId, POST /api/v1/staff/credits/adjust, POST /api/v1/staff/impersonate, POST /api/v1/staff/impersonate/end

criticalGaps: Outreach WhatsApp dispatch still a stub (email works)
Analytics outreach metrics return zeros — not integrated with timeline
Metrics not exported to external systems (in-memory only)
Credit concurrency test not yet written (S0-T3 acceptance gate for TD-01)
launchBlockers: Credit concurrency test (S0-T3) — acceptance gate for TD-01 fix

knownIssues.title: Drizzle ORM API compatibility in database package
knownIssues.description: Fixed: Schema definitions updated to use SQL expressions in index builders instead of column methods.

knownIssues.title: No RLS policies defined
knownIssues.description: Fixed: V005 adds workspace-scoped RLS policies for all 11 WP tables.

knownIssues.title: Repository type safety issues
knownIssues.description: Fixed: Raw SQL results use bracket notation, .returning() results handle undefined.

knownIssues.title: Test file type errors (pre-existing)
knownIssues.description: Test files have type errors (missing causationId in OutboxEvent, incomplete mock objects). These are excluded from build via tsconfig.build.json.
knownIssues.impact: tests pass but typecheck fails for test files

knownIssues.title: Staff service requires SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY
knownIssues.description: Staff management routes are disabled if SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY is not set. Required for staff create/promote/demote operations.
knownIssues.impact: staff management unavailable without service role key

knownIssues.title: Impersonation sessions in-memory only
knownIssues.description: Impersonation sessions are stored in memory and lost on server restart. Not suitable for multi-instance deployment.
knownIssues.impact: sessions lost on restart, not production-ready for horizontal scaling

technicalDebt: Entitlements hardcoded in tenancy middleware (not from DB)
creatorId always empty string in TenancyContext (resolved per-request)
Meilisearch getIndexStats doesn't expose actual indexing status
Outreach dispatch: event emission now transactional, but WhatsApp dispatch still a stub
Analytics outreach metrics return zeros — not integrated with timeline
Metrics not exported to external systems (in-memory only)
Upstash Redis token has permission issues (SET blocked)
ESLint not installed in web app (build warning)
Test file type errors (pre-existing, excluded from build)
Credit concurrency test not yet written (S0-T3 acceptance gate)
